values.claude: lightweight polyester mesh/jersey fabric with smooth finish

values.gpt: A black baseball jersey with contrast white piping and bold, arching 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' text on the front.
values.claude: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched collegiate lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket and collar, white-striped sleeve bands, and a Black Rose Collection woven patch near the hem.
values.gemini: A black short-sleeved baseball jersey with a button-front closure. It features white piping along the placket and collar, white stripes on the sleeves, and the phrase 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched letters across the chest.
